narrative:
Lemon Township has 10,029 registered voters, with 60.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 15.5 percentage points.
